title: Implement a clamp() utility
prompt: Create `clamp.mjs` exporting `clamp(value, min, max)` that returns `value` constrained to the inclusive range [min, max]: if value < min return min, if value > max return max, otherwise value.

grade.command: node -e "import('./clamp.mjs').then(m=>{if(m.clamp(5,0,10)!==5)throw new Error('a');if(m.clamp(-3,0,10)!==0)throw new Error('b');if(m.clamp(42,0,10)!==10)throw new Error('c');console.log('ok')})"
